title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 14 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/04/2023
DCE iron ore first rose and then fell, the main contract I2309 closed 769. an decrease of 0.83% throughout the day;part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy .today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 880 yuan/mt; the same as yesterday.
